title: Fading Enchant Glint
description: Makes the enchantment glint slowly fade in and out with a bright magenta color.
body:
## Description
The fading enchant glint makes the enchantment glint not swish around, it makes it glow in and out for anyone who wants simplicity. The enchantment glint is changed to a bright magenta for better visuals.

### Notes
If you think the glint is too bright, you can change the enchantment glint strength in the Minecraft accessibility settings.
The speed of the fading can be modified as well in the accessibility settings.

### Creation
The texture is made using a gradient to have the appearance of fading in and out.
